channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: The Big Day is Almost Here: Final Updates!
item.description: On Wednesday, May 13th important updates were sent out to all registered graduates attending commencement. Congratulations graduates!
item.author: Students

item.title: Summer 2026 Dining & Retail Hours Starting May 18th, 2026
item.description: Summer 2026 is coming up fast click the link above for everything you need to know about the dining and retail hours on campus during the summer semester.
item.author: Community

item.title: TIAA Confidential Counseling (In-Person)
item.description:
Date: Tuesday, May 19, 2026 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM - A TIAA Financial Consultant will be available for one-on-one consultations on a broad range of retirement topics. Attend this upcoming event to help you become better informed and more confident about Rensselaer’s retirement plan benefits. Consultations will be conducted in 60 minute increments. To schedule your individual retirement counseling, please call TIAA at 1-800-732-8353 or online at https://www.tiaa.org/public/login/schedule-meeting

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
